label: Music, Dance & Performing Arts
description:
Classical and ethnic music traditions (Western periods, gagaku, Hindustani, Carnatic, maqam, gamelan, etc.), Hornbostel-Sachs instrument taxonomy with 60+ traditional instruments, musical forms (fugue, raga, tala, jo-ha-kyu, etc.), and classical dance and theatre traditions (Noh, Kabuki, Bunraku, Bharatanatyam, Wayang kulit, Commedia dell'arte, etc.).

Import scripts: UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage performing arts elements, Wikidata pre-20th century classical composers.

Atom IDs: music:tradition:*, music:form:*, instr:*, perf:dance:*, perf:theatre:*, music:composer:*, ich:element:*
license: Public domain (terminology) + CC BY-SA 4.0 (Wikidata/DBpedia abstracts where used)
